query: Ugh the bathroom is way too warm my skin gets clammy just thinking about a quick shower and the dining room feels muggy the napkins would feel damp when I set the table for guests makes me fidget

steps.thought: I have verified the devices in the bathroom and dining room. The bathroom has an air purifier and a light, but no air conditioner to lower the temperature. The dining room has a fan and a light, but no dehumidifier to lower the humidity. action_input.answer: I checked the devices in the bathroom and dining room. Similarly, I cannot reduce the humidity in the dining room because there is no dehumidifier available (only a fan and a light). The fan in the dining room can circulate air, but it won't remove moisture.
